evals.prompt: Open https://github.com and get the page title
expected_calls: browser-use state OR browser-use get title
evals.expected: Opens GitHub, retrieves title via state or get title. Does NOT use screenshot to read the title.

evals.prompt: Use cloud browser to search 'AI news 2026' and return the top 3 results
expected_calls: browser-use -b remote run "Search for 'AI news 2026' and return the top 3 result titles and URLs"
evals.expected: Uses remote AI autonomous mode (async), polls task status with minimal flags, cleans up session when done

evals.prompt: I need to view my private GitHub repos using my existing GitHub login
evals.expected: Lists profiles first, checks domain cookies, syncs only github.com domain (not full profile), uses synced cloud profile

evals.prompt: Run 3 browser agents in parallel to research competitors A, B, and C
expected_calls: browser-use -b remote run "Research competitor A pricing and features"
browser-use -b remote run "Research competitor B pricing and features"
browser-use -b remote run "Research competitor C pricing and features"
evals.expected: Launches 3 async tasks, each gets own session, polls task list, cleans up all sessions after

evals.prompt: A cloud browser task has been running for 10 minutes and task status shows cost not increasing
evals.expected_behavior: Detects stuck task (cost not increasing = no progress). Stops the stuck task. Creates a new session instead of trying to reuse the stopped one.
evals.expected: Identifies stuck task from stale cost, stops it, creates fresh session (does NOT reuse stopped session)
